breaking.title: West Asia war highlights: Latest Israeli strikes killed 47 in Lebanon, Health Ministry says
breaking.summary: Talks between the U.S. and Iran were called off on June 19 after intense fighting between Israel and Hezbollah in southern Lebanon, officials said

breaking.title: Israel and Hezbollah agree ceasefire, US says, as more Lebanon strikes reported
breaking.summary: The agreement followed concerns that continued clashes would undermine the deal to end the war between the US and Iran.

breaking.title: Russian attacks kill three in Ukraine's Kramatorsk
breaking.summary: Vadym Filashkin, ‌Governor ⁠of Donetsk ⁠region, said on the Telegram app that ​six others ‌had been injured in two attacks on the ‌city, with ​strikes occurring near a high-rise ⁠apartment building and a car ‌park.

breaking.title: U.S. strike on alleged drug boat kills three in eastern Pacific Ocean
breaking.summary: The latest attack brings the number of people who have been killed in boat strikes by the U.S. military to at least 211 since the Trump administration began targeting those it calls “narcoterrorists” in early September

breaking.title: Eyewitnesses describe injuries and confusion of Bedford train crash
breaking.summary: The East of England Ambulance Service says nearly 90 people have been injured -over 30 of them seriously.

breaking.title: AK-47 Rifle, 26 Pistols Seized Near Indo-Pak Border In Amritsar, 1 Arrested
breaking.summary: AK-47 rifle and 25 pistols from his possession near the Indo-Pakistan border in Amritsar in Punjab.

breaking.title: BJP worker killed in Howrah; W.B. CM promises law to seize properties of accused
breaking.summary: West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari asked people not to go to the houses of people accused of corruption and electoral violence and urged them to keep faith in the police and the administration to take stringent action in accordance with the law

breaking.title: Italy's Meloni says Trump 'made up' story that she 'begged' him for photo at G7
breaking.summary: The highly public exchange is an indication that their earlier close ties have frayed  since Trump's decision to go to war with Iran.
